name: inventory-system
description: نظام إدارة مخزون مخبز/كافيه — Node.js + Express + PostgreSQL (node-postgres). راجع CLAUDE.md.

scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.test:integration: vitest run tests/integration tests/items.test.js tests/categories.test.js tests/alerts.test.js tests/transactions.test.js
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:stress && npm run test:frontend
